title: helwingia japonica subsp. formosana
intro: Helwingia japonica subsp. formosana, also known as Taiwanese Helwingia, is a species of plant in the Helwingia family, native to Taiwan and a rare and endangered plant species. It has been used in traditional medicine for its potential medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant is believed to have health benefits such as reducing fever, relieving pain, and improving respiratory function, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy. In herbal preparations, the plant is typically used in infusions, decoctions, or as a tincture, with the leaves and stems being the primary parts utilized for medicinal purposes.
